segments.text: These products look ordinary, but their packaging made them millions. Each one solved a problem nobody thought about. The last one is going to blow your mind.
First, we have Lucky Cat, who made cologne solid instead of spray. No mess,
no breaking, it just fits in your pocket. Smart and simple, but it was just the beginning. In Brazil, they package each cake slice separately. It
looks so perfect and tempting, and you can't resist buying it. Starting in vending machines, now it's everywhere.
That's smart. But still, I feel the most convenient design is this coffee pouch who lets you make coffee directly inside it. Add water, wait a few minutes, and
done. No cups, no mess, and no dirty dishes. Perfect for travel and it's going viral everywhere. I'm just going to buy it. Subscribe for more amazing design
